name: Lidded Metal Pampas 4-Wick Jar Candle Brass Finish 20oz - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Instantly add warmth and a soothing aroma to any room in your house with this Lidded Metal Pampas 4-Wick Jar Candle with Brass Finish from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This metal jar candle features the refreshing perfume of black currant to transform your abode into a sweet-smelling oasis, and its four-wick design releases ample scent into your space. Set in a brass-finish metal jar with "Pampas" engraved in the front, the multi-wick candle can provide up to 40 hours of warm glow, and the lid allows you to safely store it when not in use. Simply place this scented candle jar on any surface or countertop and enjoy the relaxing scents of pampas.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather ∙ Create ∙ Enjoy
